Mt 18:10; Lu 15:10; 16:22; Heb 1:14 and names. 7:4-8; Nu 2:2-32; Ac 26:7 Eze 48:31-34 foundations. 19-21; Isa 54:11; Heb 11:10 and in. 18:20; Mt 10:2-4; 16:18; 1Co 3:10,11; Ga 2:9; Eph 2:20; 3:5; 4:11 Jude 1:17 a golden. 11:1,2; Ex 40:3-5; Eze 41:1-5; Zec 2:1 four square.The square form of this city probably denotes its stability; while its vast dimensions, being 1,500 miles on each side, are emblematical of magnificence, and of its capability of containing all the multitude of inhabitants which should ever enter it, however immense or innumerable.
